_comment: Mock CRM. Dates are relative to the build date (2026-06-26). Risk is computed at runtime against the REAL today by mcp_server/crm_server.py::risk_assessment, so D-1002 and D-1003 are the clearly at-risk deals (stale > 14 days and/or past close date) while the others look healthy.

deals.name: Acme Corp - Platform Renewal
deals.notes: Sent redlined MSA; their legal is reviewing. Dana asked for the SOC 2 report to clear a security questionnaire - owe it to her by Friday.

deals.name: Globex - Data Warehouse Expansion
deals.notes: Proposal sent 3+ weeks ago with no reply. Tom said budget approval is pending with the CFO. Should check in and offer to present the ROI model to finance.

deals.name: Initech - Onboarding Add-on
deals.notes: Verbal yes on the add-on but the close date already slipped. Samir is waiting on updated pricing for 50 seats - that pricing sheet is the only thing blocking signature.

deals.name: Umbrella Health - Pilot
deals.notes: Demo went well. Lena is looping in her director next week. Next step is to schedule the technical deep-dive.

deals.name: Stark Industries - Seat Upsell
deals.notes: Order form sent and Will confirmed signature this week. Healthy - just monitor.
